title: Item automation
excerpt: I recommend automations for items and not just the board.  For me, if I could set an automation for just a certain item on the board to trigger a notification when status changes etc, that would be great.

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I recommend automations for items and not just the board. For me, if I could set an automation for just a certain item on the board to trigger a notification when status changes etc, that would be great.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @awright

Actually automations and integrations are on item level. Although you add those to the board it executes on item level. As an example: “When status change to Done notify me” will notify you when a specific item changes to Done. Is that what you are looking for?
